behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all relevant files, command names (press, keydown, etc.), literal strings (dialog-accept or dialog-dismiss, upload), the clearedBy structure with tool/skill fields, the eval => detection, and SKILL.md requirements.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what should happen but doesn't give exact code changes or line numbers.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests mostly check structural/behavioral outcomes (help.json names, JSON validity, build/lint pass) rather than gold-specific helper names.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests run npm ci, ESLint, TypeScript parser, build scripts via subprocess — executing code rather than only grepping text.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require build success, ESLint pass, and validated JSON content for new commands — a stub would not satisfy these.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover help.json command names, build, lint, syntax; though truncated, visible tests align with documented behaviors.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped by Gates and Pass-to-pass sections with descriptive names and docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: Instruction specifies clearedBy has tool and skill fields and help.json command names explicitly.

no_typos.reason: No typos found in filenames or command names.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction references file names (expected) but does not cite specific line numbers or buggy code.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, not an agentmd config edit.
